mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO realtime_holding ( account_id, broker_code, ts_code, stock_code, stock_name, quantity, available_quantity, cost_price, last_price, market_value, profit_amount, profit_ratio, snapshot_time, raw_payload, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.accountId}, #{item.brokerCode}, #{item.tsCode}, #{item.stockCode}, #{item.stockName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.availableQuantity}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.lastPrice}, #{item.marketValue}, #{item.profitAmount}, #{item.profitRatio}, #{item.snapshotTime}, #{item.rawPayload}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_name = VALUES(stock_name), quantity = VALUES(quantity), available_quantity = VALUES(available_quantity), cost_price = VALUES(cost_price), last_price = VALUES(last_price), market_value = VALUES(market_value), profit_amount = VALUES(profit_amount), profit_ratio = VALUES(profit_ratio), snapshot_time = VALUES(snapshot_time), raw_payload = VALUES(raw_payload), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
